history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person is wrapped in an American flag, with only one eye visible peeking out from the fabric. The flag is draped over their head and shoulders, obscuring most of their face and body. The person is wearing a black top underneath the flag. The background consists of a plain, light-colored curtain on the left and a darker, shadowed wall on the right, creating a subtle contrast. The lighting is soft and somewhat dim, casting gentle shadows and highlighting the texture of the flag's fabric. The color palette is dominated by the red, white, and blue of the American flag, with the black of the top adding a grounding element. The mood is mysterious and intriguing, with the hidden face and the iconic flag creating a sense of veiled identity. The image has a slightly grainy, intimate feel, as if it were a candid or personal photograph.
